news.headline: Aquarion Water Company buys Ansonia, CT municipal wastewater system, biggest in New England privatization.
news.summary: Aquarion Water Company, based in Bridgeport, Connecticut, has announced the successful acquisition of the municipal wastewater system of the City of Ansonia. This deal, completed on December 3, 2024, stands as the most extensive privatization of a municipal wastewater system in all of New England. The company expressed satisfaction with the transaction, highlighting the expansion of their operations and services as a result.

news.headline: Mainz Biomed N.V. announces 1-for-40 stock split and collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific, focusing on cancer screening product.
news.summary: Mainz Biomed N.V. (NASDAQ:MYNZ) has announced a 1-for-40 reverse stock split effective on Dec. 3. This company focuses on early cancer detection. They recently formed a collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) via its subsidiary Life Technologies Corporation. Through this agreement, Mainz Biomed and Thermo Fisher will work together to develop and potentially market Mainz Biomed’s Next Generation colorectal cancer screening product. The collaboration will leverage Thermo Fisher's technologies and systems to help Mainz Biomed create proprietary assays for its mRNA-based next-generation colorectal cancer screening.

news.headline: IsoEnergy shareholders approve two resolutions at Special Meeting. TSX: ISO (up 5%) and OTCQX: ISENF (up 8%).
news.summary: In Toronto on December 3, 2024, IsoEnergy Ltd. (TSX: ISO) (OTCQX: ISENF) shared positive news about resolutions approved by shareholders. At a Special Meeting of Shareholders, the company confirmed that the resolutions were backed by an overwhelming majority of Shareholders. This significant approval signifies a strong show of support for IsoEnergy's direction and future plans.

news.headline: Cartier finds high-grade values on Globex’s Nordeau West claims near Chimo Gold Mine. Globex holds 3% GMR.
news.summary: Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. announced updates on drilling conducted by Cartier Resources Inc. on Globex's Nordeau West claims situated east of the Chimo Gold Mine. The VG10 and VG10 South structures on the Nordeau West Royalty claims have revealed new assays. Globex holds a 3% Gross Metal Royalty on these claims. The trading symbols for Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. are GMX on the Toronto Stock Exchange, G1MN on various European stock exchanges, and GLBXF on the OTCQX International in the US. Cartier Resources Inc. is listed as ECR on the TSXV and 6CA on the FSE.

news.headline: In select areas, parents are cutting down on diaper use to save more money.
MARA launches eco-friendly ASIC recycling with wind energy in Texas, saving on energy costs.
news.summary: Utilizing surplus wind power and repurposed ASICs, the Bitcoin miner aims to cut costs and reduce energy consumption at its recently acquired Texas facility. This innovative approach not only enhances sustainability but also contributes to significant savings in both energy and expenses.

news.headline: Trump's economic agenda faces challenge due to high national debt, exceeding $23 trillion.
USA's increasing debt ceiling may complicate Fed's balance-sheet reduction plans.
Burleson real estate market slows in 2024, homes taking longer to sell but prices holding firm.
news.summary: In Burleson, Texas, a recent analysis conducted by J & J Cash Home Buyers and MJ Properties shows that the real estate market is experiencing longer selling times in 2024. Despite this, homes are still being sold at robust prices, indicating a strong market. The report highlights that the average selling time has increased, but the final sales prices remain competitive, showcasing resilience in the local real estate sector. This information provides valuable insights for potential buyers and sellers in Burleson, Texas, demonstrating the market's stability despite the extended selling periods observed this year.

news.headline: Alameda's Housing Authority opens wait list for Housing Choice Voucher and Select Project-Based Voucher Programs.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Alameda, California, the Housing Authority of the City of Alameda (AHA) announced the opening of waitlists for the Housing Choice Voucher program (HCV) and specific Project-Based Voucher (PBV) programs. This initiative allows individuals to apply for housing assistance through these programs. Interested individuals can submit their applications to be added to these waitlists for potential future housing opportunities.

news.headline: Alex Mashinsky to admit guilt to 2 charges in a plea deal. Former Celsius CEO faced 7 felony counts; agreed to "non-prosecution" in 2023.
news.summary: In the United States, the ex-CEO of Celsius is facing charges for seven felony offenses connected to fraud and deceiving users. This comes after a "non-prosecution agreement" was made with the company in 2023.

news.headline: RadarRadar chosen by White River Nutrition for commodity price risk management, enhancing hedging strategies.
news.summary: RadarRadar, a software provider for managing commodity price risk, revealed that White River Nutrition (White River) has chosen its platform as a holistic tool for handling commodity risk and executing a Risk Governance Policy. The platform offers White River the capability to set up automated procedures for monitoring and assessing underlying positions, and enhancing its hedging strategies. This tool allows transparent insight into White River's positions.

news.headline: New: NVIDIA launches AI-based video search and summarization to improve video analytics, enhancing content understanding and user engagement. #tech #AI
news.summary: NVIDIA has unveiled a cutting-edge AI workflow designed for video search and summarization. This new solution aims to tackle the complexities of video analytics utilizing state-of-the-art AI technologies. The system significantly improves the comprehension of video content and enhances user engagement. The introduction of this innovation marks a major advancement in the field, promising a more efficient and effective approach to handling video data.

news.headline: Locally launches first Omni-Seller Marketplace with Trek Bicycle, bridging online-offline retail.
news.summary: In New Orleans on December 3, 2024, the premier technology solution that has been connecting online and offline retail sectors since 2014 introduced the groundbreaking Omni-Seller Marketplace (OSM) in collaboration with Trek Bicycle, a prominent figure in the cycling market worldwide. Through Locally's OSM platform, a new avenue for retail operations has been established ...

news.headline: Richmond American Homes opens Seasons at Summit Ridge in Apopka, Florida, offering new homes with designer finishes.
news.summary: A new residential development called Seasons at Summit Ridge located in Apopka, Florida, is introducing high-quality homes with carefully selected designer finishes. The Grand Opening event is set to take place on December 3, 2024. This project is being launched by Richmond American Homes of Florida, LP, a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc. This development is aimed at providing exceptional living spaces for potential homeowners in the area.

news.headline: AI agents will dominate in 2025, predicts Bloomberg.
Subsidiary of Eco Bright Future, Inc., United Heritage, obtains Bitcoin exchange license in El Salvador.
news.summary: A subsidiary of Eco Bright Future, Inc., known as United Heritage, has successfully obtained a license to operate as a Bitcoin exchange in El Salvador. This license allows United Heritage to facilitate the buying, selling, and trading of Bitcoin within the country. This development marks a significant step towards fostering digital currency transactions in El Salvador and indicates a growing acceptance of cryptocurrencies in the region. The Bitcoin exchange license obtained by United Heritage is expected to enhance its market position and further its expansion efforts in the cryptocurrency sector.

news.headline: Dow Jones stocks slip, S&P 500 and Nasdaq steady. Nvidia nears buy point, Tesla falls due to Musk pay package ruling.
news.summary: Stocks on the Dow Jones experienced a decline at the beginning of trading on Tuesday, while both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq maintained stability in today's market. Notably, Nvidia witnessed an increase in value, nearing a potential buy point. The Dow Jones managed to reduce its losses as investor attention turned towards Powell's anticipated actions. However, Tesla registered a decrease following a ruling on Musk's pay package.

news.headline: High Wire Networks prepares for market expansion and growth after posting record revenues in Q3 2024.
news.summary: Following exceptional performance in the third quarter of 2024, the company achieved record revenues from continuing operations. This success has positioned the company for a significant market expansion and growth trajectory in the near future. With a focus on sustainable growth, the company is gearing up for further success in the market.

news.headline: AT&T CEO forecasts return to profit, aiming for better results.
IKO concludes successful Profit Power events in Charlotte, NC & Austin, TX. Event hosted in minor league ballparks.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on December 3, 2024, IKO, a global frontrunner in roofing, waterproofing, and insulation for residential and commercial sectors, is excited to share the remarkable achievements of its Profit Power events. Held at minor league ballparks, these events showcased...

news.headline: Canada and US strengthen critical mineral partnership amid China's ban on gallium, germanium, antimony | Dec. 3, 2024
news.summary: In response to U.S. restrictions on semiconductor exports, China has announced a ban on exporting key high-tech materials like gallium, germanium, and antimony with military applications. This decision highlights the growing tensions in global trade. The ban includes several crucial materials and is seen as a strategic move. It reflects the escalation of trade disputes between China and the United States, impacting industries reliant on these materials. This move is detrimental for various sectors and emphasizes the delicate nature of international trade relations.

news.headline: FDA reports on news, FDA posts final guidance on Marketing Submission Recommendations for predetermined change control plan.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland on December 3, 2024, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration released a summary of updates from various divisions within the agency. A notable release was the finalized guidance on Marketing Submission Recommendations for a Predetermined Change Control Plan. This guidance provides instructions for handling changes in marketing submissions. This update aims to streamline processes related to predetermined changes.

news.headline: Rivada Secure Services Office forms to benefit U.S. government and defense, with cutting-edge LEO satellite network.
news.summary: Cutting-edge LEO satellite network is crucial for driving innovation in DoD satcoms. The network features a unique global data constellation using satellite-to-satellite laser links, providing ultra-secure and highly low latency connectivity. This system combines the speed of fiber optics with the broad coverage of satellite technology, employing a gateway-less architecture to facilitate seamless communication.

news.headline: Barolo & Barbaresco World Opening event to feature 160+ producers in Austin on March 25, with educational sessions in 6 US cities.
news.summary: Scheduled for March 25th in Austin, this year's event will showcase a new format featuring a grand tasting with more than 160 producers. Alongside this, the Barolo & Barbaresco Academy will host educational sessions in six U.S. cities. The event will take place in Austin on December 3, 2024, and will be organized by the Consorzio di Tutela.

news.headline: Willie Mack III receives sponsor exemption to 2025 Farmers Insurance Open after debut performance in 2024 U.S. Open.
news.summary: Mack III has secured his second entry into the event following his impressive debut at the 2024 U.S. Open. The news was revealed by tournament officials in San Diego on December 3, 2024. The Century Club of San Diego and Farmers Insurance® shared the announcement regarding the exemption for the Farmers Insurance Open, indicating Mack III's increasing success in professional golf.

news.headline: HanesBrands marks 15 years of Hanes for Good, donating 6M+ essential items to the unhoused nationwide.
news.summary: A company based in Winston-Salem, N.C., HanesBrands Inc., known for its renowned apparel brands and commitment to sustainability, marks the 15th year of its charitable initiative, Hanes for Good. Launched in 2009, the program has contributed over 6 million items, notably 4 million pairs of socks, distributed to numerous partner organizations throughout the United States, including Washington D.C., Puerto Rico, and Guam. Originally initiated to address the high demand for socks in homeless shelters, this initiative has grown significantly over the years.

news.headline: Nokia Corp repurchased its own shares on 03.12.2024.
Fnac Darty corrects voluntary tender and exchange offer for all Unieuro shares on December 3, 2024.

NVIDIA elevates physical AI by pairing Isaac Sim with AWS, empowering robotics simulation development. Utilizing NVIDIA L40S GPUs for enhanced efficiency in industries like manufacturing and logistics.
news.summary: NVIDIA has made significant strides in the field of physical artificial intelligence (AI) by merging Isaac Sim with AWS. This integration leverages the powerful NVIDIA L40S GPUs to improve robotics simulation and development processes. These advancements are particularly beneficial for industries such as manufacturing and logistics, enabling the creation of scalable solutions.

news.headline: NVIDIA's AI Blueprints automate security patching in AWS CI pipelines, improving app security and operational efficiency.
news.summary: In a recent development, NVIDIA has launched AI Blueprints aimed at automating the process of early security patching within CI pipelines on AWS. This innovation is set to bolster application security and optimize operational efficiency. The utilization of AI in this process is expected to significantly enhance the speed and accuracy of security patching, ultimately benefiting businesses utilizing AWS services. This advancement underscores the growing importance of integrating AI solutions in various operational aspects for improved outcomes.

news.headline: Friedman Industries, Inc. to pay $0.04 cash dividend per share on Feb. 14, 2025, marking its 212th consecutive quarterly dividend.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Longview, Texas, the Board of Directors of Friedman Industries, Incorporated (NYSE American: FRD), a company specializing in steel processing, pipe manufacturing, and distribution, announced a cash dividend of $0.04 per share on its Common Stock. Shareholders of record at the close of business on January 17, 2025, will receive the dividend on February 14, 2025. This payout represents the 212th consecutive quarterly cash dividend issued by the company since its initial public offering in 1972.

news.headline: Canadian Union advocates for investing in public housing workers in Newfoundland and Labrador, emphasizing quality services and safe housing over private contracts. #SupportWorkers #PublicHousing
news.summary: In St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, the Canadian Union of Public Employees is advocating for the provincial government to prioritize investing in public housing workers. They are urging the government to allocate funds towards supporting these workers instead of opting for private contracts that do not meet the high demand for housing. Jerry Butler, the President of the Union, emphasized the importance of their members who work diligently to ensure that public housing in the province offers safe and secure accommodation. The Union's call highlights the need to support public housing workers as they strive to meet the housing needs of the people of Newfoundland and Labrador effectively.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens new community, Enchanted Bluff, near San Antonio, Texas, with one-acre home sites and model home at 8279 Blue Oak Way.
news.summary: In Garden Ridge, Texas, on Dec. 03, 2024, Toll Brothers, Inc. revealed that their latest community, Toll Brothers at Enchanted Bluff, is now available for purchase in the San Antonio area. Known as the nation’s top luxury home builder, the community features large one-acre home sites and sophisticated single- and two-story home designs. The Sales Center and a model home by Toll Brothers can be visited at 8279 Blue Oak Way in Garden Ridge. Toll Brothers is listed as TOL on NYSE.

news.headline: High Tide's (NASDAQ:HITI) stock surged 21%, now trading at $3.55/share. Volume surged to 856,995 shares, signaling investor interest and bullish trend. Bullish momentum seen after breakout above $2.58 resistance level.
news.summary: High Tide's (NASDAQ:HITI) stock has surged 21% recently, reaching $3.55 on Dec. 2, indicating a positive trend for the cannabis retailer. The increase in trading volume, with 856,995 shares traded during the rally, reflects strong investor interest and confidence in the stock's potential. The breakout above the $2.58 resistance level, previously tested and rejected in May, signals a turning point for the company. This new support level shows strong underlying demand for High Tide's stock, pointing towards a bullish resurgence. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Wednesday FX Option Expiries
Greif, Inc. declares quarterly dividends of $0.54 per Class A share and $0.80 per Class B share.
news.summary: In Delaware, Ohio on December 3, 2024, Greif, Inc. revealed that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.54 for each share of Class A Common Stock (NYSE: GEF) and $0.80 for each share of Class B Common Stock (NYSE: GEF.B). Greif, Inc. is renowned worldwide for its manufacturing of industrial packaging solutions and related services.

news.headline: Kerry Sirkka named Chief Recruitment Officer at Medical Solutions to boost recruitment strategies and growth nationwide.
news.summary: Kerry Sirkka has been named the Chief of the executive team at Medical Solutions in Omaha, Nebraska, effective December 3, 2024. Sirkka's role will focus on enhancing recruitment strategies to drive growth in travel nursing and healthcare staffing throughout the country. This appointment is significant for Medical Solutions as they continue to lead in healthcare staffing and talent innovation.

news.headline: Deere & Company increases quarterly dividend by 15 cents per share to $1.62 for stockholders.
news.summary: In Moline, Illinois on December 3, 2024, the Board of Directors of Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.62 per share. This dividend is slated to be payable on February 10, 2025, to stockholders who are on record as of December 31, 2024. The increased quarterly rate is up by 15 cents per share compared to the previous dividend issuance.

news.headline: Seven finalists chosen for 2025 SPIE Startup Challenge at Photonics West, vying for $10,000 top prize.
news.summary: In Bellingham, Washington, seven early-stage startup companies have been chosen to vie for a grand prize of $10,000 at the 15th edition of the SPIE Startup Challenge during Photonics West on January 28th. This challenge serves as a competitive stage for new ventures leveraging optics and photonics for cutting-edge products or applications. As part of the competition, these teams are contending for sponsored rewards while also seeking to enhance their visibility among potential investors and experts in the field.

news.headline: Virgin Voyages introduces cruise product accepting Bitcoin, expands on the previous passes providing a year's worth of trips for one price.
news.summary: The latest pass expands upon previous seasonal passes by providing a year's worth of trips for one flat rate.

news.headline: Meme coins like Dogecoin and Pepe dip as attention turns to XRP. Traders anticipate growth in the crypto sector in 2022.
news.summary: There is a belief that the sector still has significant potential for growth, as traders aim to capitalize on optimistic speculation as we move into the upcoming year.

news.headline: Coinbase ends relationship with law firms hiring ex-SEC officials considered 'anti-crypto', including Milbank. CEO Armstrong reacts.
news.summary: The CEO of Coinbase, Brian Armstrong, referenced Milbank, a worldwide law firm, which has recently brought aboard a former leader of the SEC’s Enforcement Division.

news.headline: 2024 GAM3 Awards winners across 21 categories revealed with exciting prizes. Check out the list of winners now!
news.summary: Celebrate all the victors of the GAM3 Awards 2024 in 21 different categories. Discover the individuals or groups that emerged victorious and the exciting prizes they will be awarded for their achievements.

news.headline: Sandbox, Decentraland, and Gala tokens surge due to Web3 potential, says Yield Guild Games co-founder.
news.summary: According to Gabby Dizon, co-founder of Yield Guild Games, individuals are holding gaming tokens due to their faith in Web3's ability to revolutionize the gaming industry.

news.headline: ECB advances on offline digital euro payments for mobile, ensuring privacy for CBDC transactions.
news.summary: Enabling offline transactions is essential for safeguarding the privacy of Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) payments, which function similarly to cash. The feature allows users to make transactions without needing an internet connection, enhancing the anonymity and security of the process. This capability is significant in facilitating private transactions using CBDCs, particularly for individuals who prioritize privacy in their financial activities.

news.headline: Bill introduced by Patrick McHenry & Maxine Waters aims to regulate AI in financial services as it impacts mortgage lending & credit scoring.
news.summary: Artificial intelligence is currently influencing various sectors, including mortgage lending and credit scoring. According to statistics mentioned in the bill, the utilization of AI is significantly altering traditional processes within these industries.

news.headline: Bitcoin and XRP values in South Korea tumble; Bitcoin drops 33% on Upbit before recovering, XRP sees steeper decline.
news.summary: During recent political turmoil in South Korea, the price of Bitcoin experienced a significant 33% drop on the Upbit exchange before recovering. XRP also saw a steep decline in value during this period.

news.headline: MOG, a meme coin, approaches all-time high as Coinbase hints at listing, surging in price today.
news.summary: Today, Coinbase included another meme cryptocurrency in its upcoming listing, causing the value of MOG to surge and approach its highest levels ever.

news.headline: Hive Digital invests $60M in Paraguay expansion, buys Bitcoin miners, aims to help government hedge against inflation.
news.summary: Hive Digital is making strides in Paraguay by undertaking a significant initiative to expand its operations through the acquisition of a large number of Bitcoin mining machines. This move is not only aimed at enhancing the company's presence but also assisting the government in safeguarding against inflation risks.
